Cruella (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $86,103,234Details
International Box Office $139,706,829
Worldwide Box Office $225,810,063
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,174,705
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $4,371,697
Total $7,546,402
Further financial details...

Synopsis

In 1970s London, young fashion designer Estella de Vil becomes obsessed with dogs’ skins, especially Dalmatians, until she eventually becomes a ruthless and terrifying legend known as Cruella.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$21,496,997 (25.0% of total gross)
Legs:4.01 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:38.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$100,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,892 opening theaters/3,922 max. theaters, 6.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $101,258,084

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 28th, 2021 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: May 26th, 2021 (Wide) (Italy)
May 26th, 2021 (Wide) (Switzerland)
May 26th, 2021 (Wide) (Indonesia)
May 27th, 2021 (Wide) (Australia)
May 27th, 2021 (Wide) (Germany)
Video Release: May 28th, 2021 by Disney+
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some violence and thematic elements.
(Rating bulletin 2672 (cert #53057), 3/17/2021)
Running Time: 134 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Prequel
Plot point: Fashion, Origin Story
Social setting: Crime Caper
Subgenre: Crime Comedy
Source:Spin-Off
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Historical Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Walt Disney Pictures, Gunnfilms, Marc Platt Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

In 1970s London, young fashion designer Estella de Vil becomes obsessed with dogs’ skins, especially Dalmatians, until she eventually becomes a ruthless and terrifying legend known as Cruella.
